title: Nelson, NSN — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Nelson, NSN: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Nelson is a city in NSN with a population of 55,000. New Zealand’s sunniest city, a creative hub at the top of the South Island known for its arts, craft beer, and national parks.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
